title: Document release checklist and version bump procedure
description: Create a clear release checklist for Waystation so a local agent or human can bump versions, rebuild the executable, run verification, refresh generated artifacts, and prepare a commit without relying on chat history.
acceptance: A release checklist exists in docs or README and lists the required verification commands in the correct order.
The version bump locations are documented: package.json, src/cli/index.ts, and src/mcp/server.ts.
The checklist explains when to rebuild waystation.exe and how to handle the ignored binary artifact.
The checklist references Waystation validation, report/view regeneration, and task commit-reference dogfooding.
Docs are consistent with AGENTS.md and do not duplicate contradictory commands.
notes: This is Phase 10 release packaging. Keep the checklist practical and local-first; do not introduce a hosted release process unless it already exists.
